mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate lower the discount rate for equity valuations, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger immediate equity sell-offs within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.2pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to predict positive 60-day returns, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52% over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in the index of industrial production indicate supply-side bottlenecks that compress corporate profit margins and force negative S&P 500 returns over one month.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines do not precede negative 20-day returns during supply-constrained periods, or the signal loses predictive power when inflation exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase above 0.6% triggers immediate market repricing of future rate hikes, causing sharp negative S&P 500 returns within the following trading week.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5-day returns remain positive in over 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.6% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening that supports corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS/UNRATE signal fails to generate positive 20-day returns, with a rolling Rank IC below 0.01 across all expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in new housing starts reflect strong household balance sheets and construction sector activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: HOUST growth shows no statistically significant positive correlation with 60-day forward returns over a 4-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Falling industrial production alongside rising consumer prices creates stagflationary pressures that force immediate equity deleveraging and negative returns within one week.
failure_condition: The combined INDPRO/CPIAUCSL signal does not predict negative 5-day returns, or SPX returns are positive in more than 50% of triggered observations.
